title: My Faith.
content:
Which religion do I acknowledge? None that thou namest.
    "None that I name? And why so?" Why, for religion's own sake?
meaning:
This evocative piece by Friedrich Schiller, titled "My Faith.", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
